title: Broken node on indexed interface modport
body:
---


Author Name: **Jonathan Kimmitt** (@jrrk2)
Original Redmine Issue: 1430 from https://www.veripool.org

Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

